rules.rule: missing lineage (empty extraction_ids and synthesis_ids and grounding_ids) BLOCKS approval.
orphan semantic procedures (cited but not registered, or registered without lineage) BLOCK approval.
duplicate section_id within a manual is fail-closed.
invalid export contracts (non-deterministic, presentation-bearing, missing package_id) BLOCK approval.
hidden semantic mutation (sha256 mismatch on replay) is fail-closed.
